_meta.notes: Master Halrik — smithing trainer (Phase 5 Day 23-24). Found at iron-reach. Charges 100 coins to teach smithing; one-time fee, the skill persists across reincarnations. The metadata.teachesSkill key is read by learn_skill_from(npcId).

tagline: a wide-shouldered woman with iron-grey hair and burns on every knuckle.

behavior.default: works the forge in long, even strokes; pauses only to wipe her face with the back of a wrist
behavior.ifAttacked: drops the hammer; calls for the apprentices
narrativeHooks: The forge is the loudest thing in iron-reach. She is the second.
Her apron is older than most apprentices. The scorch marks on it are arranged like a map.
She doesn't waste words. Tools that don't pay you back, she says, were never tools.

teachingLines: First the iron. Then the hammer. Then the patience.
You'll burn yourself once. Don't burn yourself twice.

interactions.trade: rejected — 'Halrik teaches; she does not sell.'
